since_last: 40% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.08%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -1.26% · Gold +0.39% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 40% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.08%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.08%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.74%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +12.72%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +12.72%, TLN +5.64%, ASML +4.55%, AMAT +3.89%, MRVL +3.56%. Laggards: SNAP -9.72%, CRNC -6.21%, SMR -5.55%, OKLO -4.91%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.26% at $206.36
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
